description: Style Note This fabulous pair of denims from denizen adds an edgy style to your look, while the soft cotton fabric keeps you feeling comfortable all day. Team it with a T-shirt and sneakers for a weekend coffee date or with a crisp white shirt and a structured blazer for a dressed up look. Product Description Darkest blue jeans, has a buttoned and zippered closure, belt loops at the waist, brand patch at the back on the waist, two insert pockets in front, a coin pocket with taping and red rivet and two patch pockets at the back with arquette embroidery and embroidered brand logo on one. Material and Care 100% cotton Machine wash cold Use hot iron Size and Fit Slim narrow fit The model (height 6' and waist 32") is wearing a size 32
